title: Develop and manage a plan to reclaim land affected by salinity
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and manage a plan to reclaim land affected by salinity demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Review the saline area to increase productivity

pcs.text: Map the property and determine the type and severity of the salinity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Map the property and determine the type and severity of the salinity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Map the property and determine the type and severity of the salinity.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use safety and personal protective equipment applicable to the task being undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use safety and personal protective equipment applicable to the task being undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use safety and personal protective equipment applicable to the task being undertaken.

pcs.text: Install fencing to subdivide classes of land and salt-affected areas for appropriate management of each area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install fencing to subdivide classes of land and salt-affected areas for appropriate management of each area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install fencing to subdivide classes of land and salt-affected areas for appropriate management of each area.

pcs.text: Assess area for water logging, determine cause and recommend strategies to divert water or drain water from the area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess area for water logging, determine cause and recommend strategies to divert water or drain water from the area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess area for water logging, determine cause and recommend strategies to divert water or drain water from the area.

pcs.text: Review and select suitable plant and pasture species and management options available to reclaim saline area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and select suitable plant and pasture species and management options available to reclaim saline area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and select suitable plant and pasture species and management options available to reclaim saline area.

pcs.text: Calculate cost and beneficial returns of reclaiming the area, including financial, environmental and social benefits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate cost and beneficial returns of reclaiming the area, including financial, environmental and social benefits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate cost and beneficial returns of reclaiming the area, including financial, environmental and social benefits.

pcs.text: Outline reclaimed area management to protect it at vulnerable times of the year and certain times in the plant reproduction cycle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Outline reclaimed area management to protect it at vulnerable times of the year and certain times in the plant reproduction cycle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Outline reclaimed area management to protect it at vulnerable times of the year and certain times in the plant reproduction cycle.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Review the saline area to increase productivity

elements.title: Manage water use and movement

pcs.text: Install fencing to protect the watercourses through the property
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install fencing to protect the watercourses through the property?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install fencing to protect the watercourses through the property.

pcs.text: Test and modify salinity and pH of the water entering and leaving the property
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test and modify salinity and pH of the water entering and leaving the property?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test and modify salinity and pH of the water entering and leaving the property.

pcs.text: Calculate water use and establish targets to reduce the quantity by improving irrigation methods and general management practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate water use and establish targets to reduce the quantity by improving irrigation methods and general management practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate water use and establish targets to reduce the quantity by improving irrigation methods and general management practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Manage water use and movement

elements.title: Protect and manage natural areas

pcs.text: Plan a strategy to protect the natural area from increased salinity and other stresses
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan a strategy to protect the natural area from increased salinity and other stresses?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan a strategy to protect the natural area from increased salinity and other stresses.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop strategies to increase biodiversity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop strategies to increase biodiversity.

pcs.text: Plan to manage soil structure and fertility to improve soil biota

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan to manage soil structure and fertility to improve soil biota.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document review indicators?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document review indicators.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Protect and manage natural areas

elements.title: Implement a strategy to reduce salinity in the area, and document the plan

pcs.text: Communicate with adjacent property landowners, relevant authorities and community groups to reduce extent and cause of local saline areas by monitoring quality and quantity of water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with adjacent property landowners, relevant authorities and community groups to reduce extent and cause of local saline areas by monitoring quality and quantity of water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with adjacent property landowners, relevant authorities and community groups to reduce extent and cause of local saline areas by monitoring quality and quantity of water.

pcs.text: Monitor and review productivity against current innovations and salinity management techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and review productivity against current innovations and salinity management techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and review productivity against current innovations and salinity management techniques.

pcs.text: Document long-term plan to reclaim land affected by salinity

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document long-term plan to reclaim land affected by salinity.
